title: elsota lanceolata
intro: Elsota lanceolata, also known as lance-leaved elsota, is a flowering plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elsota lanceolata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Elsota lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves being the primary part used in herbal preparations.
